## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing plans, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte to launch new website on Wed (20th); content publishing can resume from Wed/Thu](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [23 pre-Sprint articles ready; \~12 Flex-related articles in progress](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Flex positioning to be primary focus for new content in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New "Context Engineering" category for AI-related content to be separate from Data Engineering](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Review

  - [23 pre-Sprint articles ready; \~10-12 need Tanmay's review](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Publishing can resume post-website launch (Wed/Thu)](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Carrie to send article links for review](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [New sovereign data integration article planned for launch day](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Website and CMS Updates

  - [Staying with Webflow; new website launching Wed (20th)](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Content team to build Webflow template for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [FAQs to be included in all articles, including schema](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### Content Strategy and Positioning

  - [Primary focus on Airbyte Flex for next few months](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New categorization system for tracking performance](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Proposed CTA framework for industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Title schema for idea generation, inspired by Fivetran's approach](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Programmatic SEO Pages

  - [Engineering team working on implementation](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [No blockers; progress expected this week](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Design team collaborating to ensure executability](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Accuracy and Partnerships

  - [External partner flagged inaccuracy in article (Airbyte mistakenly listed as data warehouse tool)](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Suggestion to always mention key partners (e.g., ClickHouse) in relevant listicles](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Team to compile list of close allies/partners for consistent mention](https://fathom.video/share/KxpL3Vvvo68oAZe2YuAWmNCcPM1QQykx?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Next Steps
